variables.mutation: mutation ProductCreate($product: ProductCreateInput!) { productCreate(product: $product) { product { variants(first: 1) { edges { node { id } } } media(first: 1) { edges { node { id } } } } } }

userErrors.message: Bulk mutations cannot contain more than 1 connection.
